headline: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD): Chris Rokos Opens New Position
summary: We just covered the Chris Rokos Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stock Picks and CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) ranks 10th on this list. CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:CRWD) is a relatively new addition to the 13F portfolio of Rokos Capital Management. The fund first disclosed a stake in the company back in the first quarter of 2022. […]
